brand_identity.rationale: Trading apps require precision and extreme legibility. The UI must feel like a professional tool that gets out of the way of the data.

rules.headings: Chivo or Manrope (Bold/Black). Used for screen titles, stock symbols.
rules.body: Manrope (Regular/Medium). Clean geometric sans for high readability.
rules.numbers: IBM Plex Mono or system default with tabular-nums. CRITICAL: All live prices, percentages, and quantities MUST use tabular numbers to prevent horizontal jitter during rapid updates.

layout_and_spacing.style_rules: Avoid heavy drop shadows. Rely on 1px solid borders (border-width: 1, border-color: subtle) and color contrast to separate elements. Flat, cardless design for lists.

motion_and_interactions.price_flash: When a stock price updates, flash the background briefly (green for up, red for down) using React Native Reanimated. Duration: 300ms fade out.
motion_and_interactions.bottom_sheet: Use smooth spring animations for the Buy/Sell order placement modal.
motion_and_interactions.tab_switch: Instant navigation without heavy transitions to maintain the feeling of speed.

splash_and_login.layout: Minimalist centered layout. Large Brand Logo/Text.
splash_and_login.action: OAuth Simulation Button -> 'Login with Upstox'. Use brand_primary (#007AFF) or pure white.
splash_and_login.ux_flow: Check for stored token -> If exists, jump to Dashboard. Else, show Login. Upon click -> Show loading spinner -> Save mock token -> Navigate.

dashboard.header: Sticky horizontal scroll of Market Indices (NIFTY 50, BANKNIFTY) with live ticking prices.
dashboard.content: Watchlist. Rows containing: Stock Symbol (Bold text), Subtitle (NSE), Right-aligned Price & Change%.
dashboard.visuals: Tap on a row to open quick actions or expand chart area.

option_chain.layout: Data-heavy 3-column table view. Center column: Strike Price (grey bg). Left: Calls (LTP, OI). Right: Puts (LTP, OI).
option_chain.highlight: The ATM (At The Money) strike row must have a distinct background (accents.atm_highlight).
option_chain.typography: Use small, dense text (12px). All numbers MUST be tabular.

order_modal.header: Toggle Switch for BUY/SELL. Changes the entire modal's accent color (Green/Red).
order_modal.fields: Quantity Stepper, Order Type (Market/Limit), Price Input. Toggles for Auto SL and Auto Target.
order_modal.footer: Massive full-width Swipe-to-Submit or bold Tap button at the bottom.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use React Native StyleSheet for styling. Do not use Tailwind unless NativeWind is pre-installed.
Implement navigation using expo-router. Create tabs for Dashboard, Option Chain, Portfolio, Orders, Profile.
For icons, use @expo/vector-icons (preferably Feather or Ionicons).
CRITICAL: Apply 'fontVariant: ["tabular-nums"]' to all text elements displaying prices, percentages, or quantities to prevent jittering.
Simulate live websockets by using `setInterval` to randomly fluctuate prices of NIFTY and Watchlist items every 1-2 seconds.
For the Buy/Sell modal, build a responsive bottom sheet using generic React Native Modals or a library like @gorhom/bottom-sheet if possible, otherwise use a custom Modal.
Use test IDs (e.g., testID='login-button') on all interactive elements as per the critical rules.
